daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today, Pisces. You're tapped into your intuition and it's genuinely powerful. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your superpower rn.
daily.love: Someone's picking up on your energy and they're drawn to it. Whether you're coupled up or floating solo, authenticity is your love language today. Being real > being perfect always.
daily.career: Your creative wavelength is immaculate. This is the moment to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take a risk on a project that excites you. Your vibe attracts your tribe professionally.
daily.health: Your nervous system wants grounding today—think long walks, journaling, or literally just touching grass. Mental clarity comes when you slow down and actually listen to what your body's telling you.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is running hot this week, Pisces. Trust those subtle nudges pulling you toward new experiences. The energy supports authenticity over people-pleasing, so lean into what actually resonates with your soul.
weekly.love: Someone's noticing your vibe shift. Whether you're attached or single, vulnerability is your superpower right now. Real connections happen when you stop filtering yourself.
weekly.career: You've got clarity on what you actually want versus what you think you should want. That difference matters. Small moves toward your real goals compound faster than you'd expect.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Movement that feels good beats workouts that feel like punishment. Rest isn't lazy—it's strategic recovery.
